form.formComment: Last start disqualified at Le Croisé-Laroche on March 30 over 2700m. Before that, disqualified at this track on March 14 over 2550m. In the mix if her manners improve.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 4th over 2150m at Ranes, beaten 19m by Manola De Muze in 3yo fillies race on April 21. Facing a tough task first-up.

form.formComment: Last start 4th over 2800m at Chartres beaten 9.2m by Miss France Piya in 4yo fillies race on April 5 at $62. At the start before 12th over 2700m at Le Croisé-Laroche beaten 44m by Midnight Du Viclau in 4yo fillies race on March 30 at $6.10. Cannot be left out of calculations.

form.formComment: Last start 7th over 2700m at Le Croisé-Laroche beaten 23m by Midnight Du Viclau in 4yo fillies race on March 30 at $22. Before that, unplaced over 2200m at Vincennes, well beaten by Missing in 4yo fillies race on February 17 at $16. Makes plenty of appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 7th over 2700m at Le Croisé-Laroche beaten 23m by Midnight Du Viclau in 4yo fillies race on March 30 at $22. Before that, unplaced over 2200m at Vincennes, well beaten by Missing in 4yo fillies race on February 17 at $16. Makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of six months. Finished off last preparation unplaced at Enghien on October 8. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 6.1m win (-25m) at Savigny-sur-Braye beating Midnight Chenu in 3yo fillies race on May 29. Nicely placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Hard to fault of late. Last start by 4m at Les Andelys beating Maestro Des Clairs in 4yo race on April 5. Hard to beat in this sort of form.

formComments.comment: Hard to fault of late. Last start by 4m at Les Andelys beating Maestro Des Clairs in 4yo race on April 5. Hard to beat in this sort of form.

form.formComment: Last start a big 31m win at this track beating My Love Story in 4yo fillies race on March 1 at $15. Key runner once again.

form.formComment: Last start 9th over 2700m at Le Croisé-Laroche, beaten 35m by Midnight Du Viclau in 4yo fillies race on March 30 at $67. Two runs back 2nd over 2500m at this track beaten 10m by Musania De Warnoc in 4yo fillies race on March 19 at $18. Will not find this easy.

form.formComment: Returns after four months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into sixth behind Maritza D'orion at Cabourg over 2750m in a 3yo fillies handicap on December 16 at $34. Sure to be very competitive.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns after four months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into sixth behind Maritza D'orion at Cabourg over 2750m in a 3yo fillies handicap on December 16 at $34. Sure to be very competitive.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start disqualified at Vire on April 5 over 2800m. The run previous 6th over 2100m at Lisieux, beaten 37m by Melitte De Riviere in 4yo fillies race on March 26 at $201. Worth another chance. Leading player.
